title: Shipnt.io
description: Shipnt.io is a mobile-friendly co-op physics based game where you and other people help free the ship stuck in the Suez Canal. The goal of the game is to free the boat currently stuck as soon as you can as you are fighting with other people on the leaderboard.
instructions: The game s avatar pulls the ship based on physics You move the avatar by dragging and pulling him around but he will always return to the ship once you let go If there is no person present or if they disconnect you can use both avatars to move further
